fields.name: Canceltext
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

This will cancel this Vetting process and all progress will be lost, are you sure you want to cancel

fields.name: Canceltext_0
fields.fieldText: You are currently not undergoing any vetting

fields.name: VettingText
fields.fieldText:
Vetting Documents - {!ClientName}

﻿

textTemplates.name: Body
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Vetting_Document_Loop.Enhanced_Vetting__r.Candidate__r.Owner.FirstName},


A candidate has completed all their vetting documents, please make sure these are verified so they can be passed to the vetting and compliance team.


Candidate Name: {!$User.Name__c}

Vetting: {!Vetting_Document_Loop.Enhanced_Vetting__r.Account__r.Name}

Completed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}


To quickly access this vetting pack click the link below:

https://bluearrowgroup--fulldev.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Enhanced_Vetting_ID}/view


Thanks

textTemplates.name: CancelBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Vetting_Document_Loop.Enhanced_Vetting__r.Candidate__r.Owner.FirstName},


A candidate has cancelled their current vetting process


Candidate Name: {!$User.Name__c}

Vetting: {!Vetting_Document_Loop.Enhanced_Vetting__r.Account__r.Name}


To quickly access this vetting pack click the link below:

https://bluearrowgroup--fulldev.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Enhanced_Vetting_ID}/view


Thanks
